creator: adsharma@sharmas.dhs.org
text:
Loading a core file in gdb using

	gdb a.out core

	loads symbols from shared libs even when auto-solib-add is 0. This
 	is a problem when debugging large binaries like mozilla.

Fix: 

It works on Linux. So sync'ing with gdb mainline might fix it.
How-To-Repeat: 
	See description.
